items.title: Bond Yields Rise and Stocks Fall on Inflation Data: Markets Wrap
items.summary: A resurgence in inflation drove stocks and bonds lower on speculation the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates higher for longer as the war in Iran boosts energy costs.

items.title: Oil Holds Near $108 With Mideast Impasse, World Inventories Drop
items.summary: Oil largely held its 8% surge over the past three sessions, as Middle East tensions simmer and global stockpiles shrink at a record pace.

items.title: North Sea Oil Fetches Discount for First Time During Iran War
items.summary: A North Sea oil grade that’s central to setting the world’s most important physical crude price traded at a discount for the first time during the Iran war, as immediate fears ease of a supply shock in Europe.

items.title: US 10-Year Treasury Yield Hits Highest Since July After PPI Data
items.summary: The yield on benchmark 10-year Treasuries rose to the highest since July after US wholesale inflation accelerated in April to the fastest pace since 2022.

items.title: Iran War Tests Turkish Central Bank’s Ambitious Inflation Target
items.summary: A global energy price shock sparked by the US-Israeli war on Iran is forcing Turkey’s central bank to raise its inflation forecasts, putting further strain on the country’s efforts to slow price gains.
